backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing the backend with user profile management, product catalog (add/filter/search), and business settings CRUD, all protected by role-based access control via AccessControl and MixinAuthorization mixins.
feature_evidence.json: A feature evidence report mapping responsive-design feature IDs and titles to their relevant frontend files, components, and test IDs for navigation, hero, services, product catalog, and gallery sections.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: A JSON document providing one-to-two sentence summaries of every frontend source file, describing each component's purpose, key hooks used, and notable implementation details.
frontend/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Tailwind directives and defines CSS custom properties for the design system's color tokens in both light and dark modes.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point for the Vite/React app, setting the page title to 'Mahaveer Plywood & Hardware Website' and mounting the React root via main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that composes the full single-page layout by rendering Navigation, all content sections (Hero, Services, ProductCatalog, Gallery, PremiumQuoteBuilder, Contact, AdminPanel), Footer, FloatingWhatsAppButton, and a Toaster.
frontend/src/components/AdminPanel.tsx: PIN-protected admin panel component with tabs for managing local products (add/delete via localStorage) and business settings (synced to the backend via useBusinessSettings), plus a TemplateEditor for WhatsApp message templates.
frontend/src/components/ContactSection.t: Renders a contact section with address, phone, and email info fetched from business settings, alongside a site visit booking form. Shows skeleton loaders while data is loading.
frontend/src/components/ContractorInquir: A form for contractor bulk inquiries that composes a WhatsApp message using configurable templates and opens WhatsApp with the filled-in details on submit.
frontend/src/components/ContractorZoneSe: Displays a 'Contractor Zone' section with bulk pricing/delivery/support benefits, service badges, a WhatsApp partnership button, and the ContractorInquiryForm.
frontend/src/components/FloatingWhatsApp: A fixed floating button that opens WhatsApp with a default greeting message, featuring an animated ping ring effect.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer displaying brand info, services, products, and contact details (phone, email, address) sourced from business settings, with a copyright notice.
frontend/src/components/GallerySection.t: Renders a grid of project gallery images with hover overlays and supports lightbox navigation (prev/next) via the ImageLightbox component.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Full-page hero section displaying a background image, headline, service badges, and action buttons (scroll-to-pricing and WhatsApp), alongside a QuickEstimateForm.
frontend/src/components/ImageLightbox.ts: Modal lightbox component that displays a full-screen image with title/description, keyboard navigation (arrow keys/Escape), and prev/next/close buttons.
frontend/src/components/InquiryBasket.ts: Sidebar/panel component that shows a list of selected products for inquiry, with options to remove items, clear all, or send the list as a WhatsApp message.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Fixed top navigation bar with smooth-scroll links, active section highlighting, a WhatsApp CTA button, and a responsive mobile hamburger menu.
frontend/src/components/PremiumQuoteBuil: Interactive quote-builder form where users select interior modules (kitchen, wardrobe, etc.) and enter contact details, then send a formatted quote request via WhatsApp.
frontend/src/components/PricingCard.tsx: Reusable pricing tier card displaying name, price, description, feature checklist, and a quote CTA button, with special styling for the 'Most Popular' tier.
frontend/src/components/PricingSection.t: Renders a pricing section with three tiers (Basic, Premium, Luxury) as PricingCard components, and handles WhatsApp quote requests using business settings and message templates.
frontend/src/components/ProductCard.tsx: Displays a single product card with image, description, and two actions: a direct WhatsApp inquiry button and an add-to-basket toggle button.
frontend/src/components/ProductCatalogSe: Renders a searchable, category-filterable product catalog grid with an inquiry basket that users can populate and submit via WhatsApp.
frontend/src/components/QuickEstimateFor: A form component that collects user name, phone, service type, budget, and area, then composes and sends a WhatsApp estimate request message.
frontend/src/components/ServiceCard.tsx: Displays a single service card with icon, title, description, feature list, and a 'Get Quote' button that opens a WhatsApp inquiry for that service.
Renders a services section with a grid of ServiceCard components for four service categories, plus dedicated WhatsApp quote call-to-action blocks for electrical and paint services.
frontend/src/components/SiteVisitBooking: A form component that collects user details (name, phone, date, work type, address) for booking a site visit and sends the request via WhatsApp using a configurable message template.
frontend/src/components/TemplateEditor.t: A reusable editor component for WhatsApp message templates that displays a textarea for editing, available placeholder badges, and a live preview with sample data substituted.
frontend/src/hooks/useActiveSection.ts: A hook that uses IntersectionObserver to track which page section (home, services, products, etc.) is currently visible in the viewport and returns its ID.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useBusinessSettings.t: A hook that fetches business settings from the ICP backend actor via React Query and exposes a mutation for updating those settings.
frontend/src/hooks/useInquiryBasket.ts: A hook managing a local in-memory list of product names for inquiry, with add, remove, and clear operations that show toast notifications.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and provider using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions and identity state to the component tree.
frontend/src/hooks/useProductCatalog.ts: A hook that fetches all products from the backend (falling back to localStorage), then filters them client-side by category and search term.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: An intentionally empty placeholder file noting that queries are handled in feature-specific hooks.
frontend/src/hooks/useWhatsAppContact.ts: A hook that retrieves the business WhatsApp number from settings and provides an `openWhatsApp` function that opens a pre-filled WhatsApp chat URL in a new tab.
A hook that exposes WhatsApp message templates from business settings and a `replacePlaceholders` utility for substituting template variables with actual data.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS defining an ultra-luxury black-and-gold theme using OKLCH CSS variables, Tailwind layers, multi-layer radial gradient backgrounds, a grain texture overlay, and section glow utilities.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with React Query's QueryClientProvider and the InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom colors (oklch-based), border radii, shadows, font families, and accordion keyframe animations, plus typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state metadata file tracking schema version, existing feature IDs with titles and requirement references, and architectural/issue notes for build planning.
